inputs.text:
**Visual Description (English):**  
A female subject with an oval face and black short hair, wearing transparent-framed glasses and a white medical mask covering the nose and mouth, positioned slightly left of center in a minimalist studio setting. The background is a plain light gray wall with a dark gray vertical structure on the right edge, approximately 15 cm from the subject. Soft directional lighting comes from the upper left, casting subtle shadows at a 45-degree angle, highlighting facial contours and creating gentle highlights on the forehead and cheekbones. The subject wears a black long-sleeve cotton blend T-shirt with a round neck, snug fit, and slight fabric texture visible under close inspection. She also wears dark gray high-waisted straight-leg trousers made of a semi-stiff synthetic blend, paired with black square-toed flat leather shoes. Her posture is upright, spine straight, shoulders relaxed, arms at sides, with the right hand raised to chest level forming a V-gesture using thumb and index finger, palm facing inward. Feet are together, right foot slightly forward at a 5-degree angle. The image exhibits a shallow depth of field, suggesting a focal length between 85mm and 105mm and an aperture of f/2.8–f/4. Composition follows a near-center alignment with asymmetrical balance due to the background element on the right. No additional accessories or props are present.

**Technical Specs:**  
Focal Length: 85–105mm | Aperture: f/2.8–f/4 | Style: Minimalist Realistic Portrait Photography | Lighting: Soft Diffused, Left-Upper Directional | Background: Plain Gray Wall with Vertical Structural Element | Subject Position: Center-Left, Golden Ratio Proximity | Skin Texture: Fine, Natural Tone, Even Pore Distribution | Clothing Material: Cotton Blend (Top), Synthetic Blend (Pants), Leather (Shoes) | Gesture: V-Shaped Hand Signal, Right Hand | Pose: Standing, Upright, Slight Forward Foot Shift
